title: Topa in Kei Hong Cingpa Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa in hong cingpa hi a, bangmahka sam kei hi;
Lonona ah hong lumsak a, tui dam kiang hong kha

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nuntakna tha hong dimsak a, keimah hong tonpih hi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sihna guam thuk ka nawk hangin, ka lau tuan het kei hi;
molhtum le Na ciangkhut in, Kei hong lungmuangsak hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka galte omna lak mah-ah, An nong
Ka lu sathau nong nilhsak a, Ka hai a dimleet hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: thupha ngah-in, nopna ka luah dinga;
Pasian’ innpi a tawntungin, ka omna ding hita.
